SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Class DatabaseSchema

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.template.impl.DatabaseSchema
public final class DatabaseSchema extends Object
Reads JDBC DatabaseMetaData into an in-memory representation for schema validation.

All name lookups are case-insensitive, since database systems vary in how they handle identifier casing (PostgreSQL lowercases, Oracle uppercases, H2 uppercases by default).

Since:
1.9

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    DatabaseSchema.DbColumn
    Represents a column discovered from the database metadata.
    static final record 
    DatabaseSchema.DbForeignKey
    Represents a foreign key relationship discovered from the database metadata.
    static final record 
    DatabaseSchema.DbPrimaryKey
    Represents a primary key column discovered from the database metadata.
    static final record 
    DatabaseSchema.DbUniqueKey
    Represents a column that is part of a unique index discovered from the database metadata.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<DatabaseSchema.DbColumn>
    getColumn(String tableName, String columnName)
    Returns the column metadata for the given table and column name.

    Returns the foreign key constraints for the given table.

    Returns the primary key columns for the given table, ordered by key sequence.

    Returns the unique key columns for the given table.

  • Method Details

    • read

      public static DatabaseSchema read(@Nonnull Connection connection) throws SQLException
      Reads the database schema from the given connection using default catalog and schema.
      Parameters:
      connection - the JDBC connection.
      Returns:
      the database schema.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • read

      public static DatabaseSchema read(@Nonnull Connection connection, @Nullable String catalog, @Nullable String schemaPattern, @Nonnull SqlDialect.SequenceDiscoveryStrategy sequenceDiscoveryStrategy, @Nonnull SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy constraintDiscoveryStrategy) throws SQLException
      Reads the database schema from the given connection using the specified discovery strategies.
      Parameters:
      connection - the JDBC connection.
      catalog - the catalog name (may be null).
      schemaPattern - the schema pattern (may be null).
      sequenceDiscoveryStrategy - the strategy for discovering sequences.
      constraintDiscoveryStrategy - the strategy for discovering primary keys, unique keys, and foreign keys.
      Returns:
      the database schema.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • tableExists

      public boolean tableExists(@Nonnull String tableName)
      Returns whether a table or view with the given name exists in the schema.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the table name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      true if the table exists.

    • getColumn

      public Optional<DatabaseSchema.DbColumn> getColumn(@Nonnull String tableName, @Nonnull String columnName)
      Returns the column metadata for the given table and column name.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the table name (case-insensitive).
      columnName - the column name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      the column metadata, or empty if not found.

    • getPrimaryKeys

      public List<DatabaseSchema.DbPrimaryKey> getPrimaryKeys(@Nonnull String tableName)
      Returns the primary key columns for the given table, ordered by key sequence.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the table name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      the primary key columns, or an empty list if none found.

    • getUniqueKeys

      public List<DatabaseSchema.DbUniqueKey> getUniqueKeys(@Nonnull String tableName)
      Returns the unique key columns for the given table.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the table name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      the unique key columns, or an empty list if none found.

    • getForeignKeys

      public List<DatabaseSchema.DbForeignKey> getForeignKeys(@Nonnull String tableName)
      Returns the foreign key constraints for the given table.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the table name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      the foreign key constraints, or an empty list if none found.

    • sequenceExists

      public boolean sequenceExists(@Nonnull String sequenceName)
      Returns whether a sequence with the given name exists in the schema.
      Parameters:
      sequenceName - the sequence name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      true if the sequence exists.
